text: Guy Orlov's data dashboard provided valuable insights that helped us enhance the programme and improve accessibility for the Deaf Gathering Cymru Festival, which took place at Chapter Arts Centre, Cardiff.
author: Jonny Cotsen, Programme Curator, Deaf Gathering Cymru, September 2023

text: Guy Orlov's effort in R Studio, combined with a technical AI tool for exploring data outcomes, provided excellent guidance. I greatly appreciated his contributions to the research data outcome in visual graphs.
author: Arjun Shrestha, PhD Student, University of Birmingham, November 2024
